positive: Minimalist geometric forest landscape print, featuring stylized silhouettes of various plants and trees arranged in a repeating, non-symmetrical pattern. The color palette is constrained to deep emerald green, earthy terracotta orange, and creamy off-white. Strong contrast and clean lines define the forms. Composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for large textile printing. Vector art style, intricate detailing, UHD quality, perfect symmetry, flat design, print-ready.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, noisy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, smudge, artifact, low contrast, photograph, realistic, 3d render
